d532e24e9da19b96fe3f6b9a4321e89fb697351f.text: Ah, [player name], you have arrived. Speak to me to begin your task.

d797da6dbd47009d5b6763f4f7e6d91d91f183b5.text: Ah, welcome [player name]. I have but one clue for you to pass this room's puzzle: 'Patience'.

a6913347b02b30ec4f4f39c58123991fbf943459.text: Excellent work, [player name]. Please step through the portal to meet your next challenge.
